text:
# Contact Us — UrbanCart

## Customer Support
- **Email**: support@urbancart.in
- **Phone**: +91 1800 123 456 (toll-free)
- **Hours**: Monday–Saturday, 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM IST

## Response Times
- Email queries: within **24 hours**
- Phone support: immediate during working hours
- Chat support: available on our website for instant help

## Support Topics We Handle
- Order status and tracking
- Returns and refund requests
- Payment issues and failed transactions
- Product information and availability
- Delivery delays and lost shipments
- Account and address management

## Escalation
- If your issue is not resolved within 48 hours, you can escalate by emailing **escalations@urbancart.in**.
- For urgent issues, call our toll-free number during business hours.

## Office Address
UrbanCart Pvt. Ltd.
123 Commerce Tower, Sector 18
Noida, Uttar Pradesh — 201301
India

# Payments — UrbanCart

## Accepted Payment Methods
- **UPI** (Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm, BHIM)
- **Credit/Debit Cards** (Visa, Mastercard, RuPay)
- **Net Banking** (all major Indian banks)
- **Wallets** (Paytm, PhonePe, Amazon Pay)

## Invoice
- An invoice is automatically generated and emailed to you after successful payment.
- You can also download invoices from your Order History page.

## Order Cancellation
- You can cancel your order within **1 hour** of placing it by contacting support.
- Once an order is **dispatched**, cancellation is not possible.
- For cancelled orders, the refund will be processed within 3–5 business days.

## Payment Security
- All transactions are secured with **256-bit SSL encryption**.
- We do **not** store your card details on our servers.
- Payments are processed through certified payment gateways.

## Failed Payments
- If your payment fails but the amount is debited, it will be auto-refunded within **5–7 business days**.
- If the refund does not appear, contact your bank or email us at **support@urbancart.in**.

# Privacy Policy — UrbanCart

## Data We Collect
- **Account information**: name, email address, phone number
- **Shipping addresses**: for delivery purposes
- **Order history**: to track and manage your purchases
- **Usage data**: pages visited, search queries (anonymised)

## How We Use Your Data
- To process and deliver your orders
- To send order confirmation, shipping updates, and invoices
- To improve our product recommendations and shopping experience
- To respond to customer support queries

## Data Sharing
- We **do not sell** your personal data to third parties.
- Data is shared only with:
  - **Payment gateways** for transaction processing
  - **Logistics partners** for delivery
  - **Legal authorities** when required by law

## Cookies
- We use cookies to improve your browsing experience.
- You can manage cookie preferences in your browser settings.

## Data Retention
- Account data is kept as long as your account is active.
- Order data is retained for 5 years for compliance.
- You can request deletion of your data by emailing **support@urbancart.in**.

## Your Rights
- Access your personal data
- Request corrections
- Request data deletion
- Withdraw consent for marketing communications

# Returns & Refunds Policy — UrbanCart

## Return Window
- You can return eligible products within **7 days** of delivery.
- Items must be **unused** and in **original packaging**.

## How to Initiate a Return
1. Email **support@urbancart.in** with your Order ID and reason for return.
2. Our team will review and approve within 24 hours.
3. A **free pickup** will be arranged within 24 hours of approval.

## Refund Processing
- Refunds are processed within **5–7 business days** after return approval.
- Amount is credited back to your **original payment method**.

## Non-Returnable Items
The following items are **non-returnable** for hygiene reasons:
- Intimate apparel
- Perishable goods
- Used or washed items

## Exchange Policy
- Exchanges are subject to availability.
- You can request an exchange instead of refund by mentioning it in your return email.

## Damaged or Defective Products
- If you receive a damaged or defective product, contact us immediately.
- We will arrange a replacement or full refund at no extra cost.
- Please share photos of the damaged item for verification.

# Shipping Policy — UrbanCart

## Delivery Timeframes
- **Metro cities** (Delhi, Mumbai, Bengaluru, Chennai): 2–4 business days
- **Tier 2 & 3 cities**: 4–7 business days
- **Remote & rural areas**: 7–10 business days

## Shipping Charges
- Orders above **₹499** — **FREE Delivery** across India
- Orders below ₹499 — Flat ₹49 delivery charge
- Furniture & large items — Additional ₹199 handling fee may apply

## Order Tracking
- Once dispatched, you will receive an SMS and email with your tracking number.
- Orders are typically dispatched within **24 hours** of placement.
- You can track your package using the tracking ID on our logistics partner's website.

## Delivery Attempts
- Our courier partner will attempt delivery up to **3 times**.
- If all attempts fail, the package is returned to our warehouse and a refund is initiated within 5–7 business days.

## Delayed or Lost Shipments
- If your order hasn't arrived within the expected timeframe, contact us at **support@urbancart.in** or call **+91 1800 123 456**.
- We will investigate and resolve the issue within 3 business days.

# Terms of Service — UrbanCart

## Acceptance of Terms
- By using UrbanCart, you agree to these Terms of Service.
- If you do not agree, please discontinue use of the platform.

## Account Usage
- You must provide accurate information when creating a profile.
- You are responsible for all activities under your account.
- UrbanCart reserves the right to suspend accounts that violate these terms.

## Product Listings
- We strive to ensure product descriptions and prices are accurate.
- Prices are listed in **Indian Rupees (₹)** and include GST unless stated otherwise.
- Product images are for illustration purposes; actual products may vary slightly.

## Orders & Pricing
- All orders are subject to acceptance and availability.
- UrbanCart reserves the right to cancel orders if pricing errors are detected.
- Promotional offers and discounts are subject to terms specified in the offer.

## Intellectual Property
- All content on UrbanCart (logos, images, text) is owned by UrbanCart.
- Unauthorized use, reproduction, or distribution is prohibited.

## Limitation of Liability
- UrbanCart is not liable for indirect, consequential, or incidental damages.
- Our total liability is limited to the amount paid by you for the specific order.

## Governing Law
- These terms are governed by the laws of India.
- Disputes shall be resolved through arbitration in New Delhi.
